creator: tkato432@yahoo.com
text:
Version 0.9.9.7.7 has been released.


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	games_anki.diff
#	games_py-anki.diff
#
echo x - games_anki.diff
sed 's/^X//' >games_anki.diff << '146d87c08f9078136585bd17bb8cf905'
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/games/anki/Makefile games/anki/Makefile
X--- /usr/ports/games/anki/Makefile	2009-02-15 15:16:06.000000000 +0900
X+++ games/anki/Makefile	2009-03-31 01:56:04.000000000 +0900
X@@ -5,36 +5,9 @@
X # $FreeBSD: ports/games/anki/Makefile,v 1.7 2009/02/14 23:01:24 makc Exp $
X #
X 
X-PORTNAME=	anki
X-PORTVERSION=	0.9.9.5
X-PORTREVISION=	1
X-CATEGORIES=	games
X-MASTER_SITES=	http://ichi2.net/anki/download/files/
X-EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
X-
X MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
X COMMENT=	Flashcard trainer with spaced repetition
X 
X-BUILD_DEPENDS=	py*-qt4-core>=4.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-qt4-core \
X-		py*-qt4-gui>=4.2:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/py-qt4-gui \
X-		py*-sip>=4.6:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-sip \
X-		py*-numpy>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/py-numpy \
X-		py*-anki>=0.4.3:${PORTSDIR}/games/py-anki \
X-		py*-matplotlib>=0.90.0:${PORTSDIR}/math/py-matplotlib
X-RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
X-
X-USE_GETTEXT=	yes
X-USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
X-USE_PYTHON=	yes
X-USE_QT_VER=	4
X-QT_COMPONENTS=	moc_build
X-PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	ankiqt
X-PORT_VERBS=	ankiqt
X-
X-post-extract:
X-	@cd ${WRKSRC}/&&${RM} -rf libanki build
X-
X-post-patch:
X-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/req/d' ${WRKSRC}/setup.py
X+MASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}
X 
X-.include <bsd.port.mk>
X+.include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile.inc"
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/games/anki/Makefile.inc games/anki/Makefile.inc
X--- /usr/ports/games/anki/Makefile.inc	1970-01-01 09:00:00.000000000 +0900
X+++ games/anki/Makefile.inc	2009-05-01 16:21:57.000000000 +0900
X@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
X+# $FreeBSD$
X+
X+PORTNAME=	anki
X+PORTVERSION=	0.9.9.7.7
X+CATEGORIES=	games
X+MASTER_SITES=	http://ichi2.net/anki/download/files/
X+EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
X+
X+USE_PYTHON=	yes
X+USE_GETTEXT=	yes
X+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
X+
X+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X+
X+.if !defined(PKGNAMEPREFIX)
X+BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYNUMPY} \
X+		py*-qt4-core>=4.4:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-qt4-core \
X+		py*-sip>=4.6:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-sip \
X+		py*-matplotlib>=0.90.0:${PORTSDIR}/math/py-matplotlib \
X+		py*-qt4-gui>=4.4:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/py-qt4-gui
X+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS} \
X+		py*-anki>=0.9.9:${PORTSDIR}/games/py-anki \
X+		py*-svg>=4.4:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/py-qt4-svg \
X+		py*-network>=4.4:${PORTSDIR}/net/py-qt4-network \
X+		py*-webkit>=4.4:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-qt4-webkit
X+
X+USE_QT_VER=	4
X+QT_COMPONENTS=	corelib gui
X+PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	ankiqt
X+
X+PORT_VERBS=	ankiqt
X+.else
X+BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYNUMPY} \
X+		py*-pysqlite>=0:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-pysqlite23 \
X+		py*-sqlalchemy>=0:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-sqlalchemy \
X+		py*-game>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-game \
X+		py*-simplejson>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-simplejson \
X+		py*-matplotlib>=0.90.0:${PORTSDIR}/math/py-matplotlib
X+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS} \
X+		kakasi:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/kakasi
X+
X+PLIST=		pkg-plist.py-anki
X+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME}/lib${PORTNAME}
X+.endif
X+
X+post-patch:
X+.if !defined(PKGNAMEPREFIX)
X+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/req/d' ${WRKSRC}/setup.py
X+.endif
X+
X+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

X # $FreeBSD: ports/games/py-anki/Makefile,v 1.6 2009/02/05 15:46:40 amdmi3 Exp $
X #
X 
X-PORTNAME=	anki
X-PORTVERSION=	0.9.9.5
X-CATEGORIES=	games python
X-MASTER_SITES=	http://ichi2.net/anki/download/files/
X-PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
X-EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
X-
X MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
X COMMENT=	Spaced-repetition memory training library
X 
X-BUILD_DEPENDS=	py*-numpy>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/py-numpy \
X-		py*-game>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-game \
X-		py*-simplejson>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-simplejson \
X-		py*-sqlalchemy>=0:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-sqlalchemy \
X-		py*-pysqlite>=0:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-pysqlite23 \
X-		py*-matplotlib>=0.90.0:${PORTSDIR}/math/py-matplotlib
X-RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS} \
X-		kakasi:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/kakasi
X-
X-USE_GETTEXT=	yes
X-USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
X-USE_PYTHON=	yes
X-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME}/lib${PORTNAME}
X+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
X+MASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../anki
X 
X-.include <bsd.port.mk>
X+.include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile.inc"

X-Anki is a library based on a theory called spaced repetition. In
X-simple terms, it means that each time you review some material, you
X-should wait longer than last time before reviewing it again.

X-Author: Damien Elmes <anki@ichi2.net>
